title: Silicone Trivet Mats 4 Pcs Set, Heat-Resistant Non-Slip Hot Pads for Kitchen, Trivets for Hot Dishes,Pots,Pans,Multi-Purpose Table Mats & Coasters for Countertops,Dining(Grey)
features: Premium Silicone Material: Crafted from high-quality silicone, this heat-resistant mat offers exceptional thermal endurance, withstanding temperatures from -104°F to 446°F (40°C - 230°C). It effectively protects kitchen countertops, dining tables, and various surfaces from scorching hot pots, plates, cookware, or baking pans. It withstands high temperatures, ensuring kitchen safety during daily cooking and dining.

Non-slip Design: The silicone pad features a honeycomb texture on its surface, ensuring a secure grip when supporting hot cookware or resting on tabletops. Eliminate worries about pots sliding and spilling, providing stable support for hot kitchenware and effectively reducing accident risks.

4 Piece Set (2 Square + 2 Round): This set includes 4 versatile shapes—2 square + 2 round heat-resistant mats. Diverse designs accommodate various cookware and tableware, supporting everything from small bowls to large pots, meeting all high-temperature item placement needs in the kitchen.

Multifunctional & Versatile: These silicone mats serve not only as heat pads for hot dishes and cookware but also as table mats, coasters, or even spoon rests. Whether on kitchen countertops, dining tables, or outdoor dining settings, they adapt seamlessly to enhance daily convenience.

Easy Cleaning & Durability: Crafted from durable silicone material, they withstand long-term use without wear. Cleaning is effortless—simply rinse under running water or place in the dishwasher for hassle-free kitchen maintenance.
